research.market_summary: Unable to access local journal/position/observation files in this run due a sandbox execution failure, so no evidence-based session summary can be produced.

patterns_detected.name: data_unavailable
patterns_detected.notes: Local file reads for today's reports and active positions were blocked by environment error: bwrap loopback RTM_NEWADDR permission failure.

confidence_calibration.assessment: No trade-level evidence could be evaluated from source files in this run.

research.forward_outlook: Re-run reflection after restoring local shell access; then validate active swing symbols and one end-of-day close check.
lessons: Reflection quality is only as good as journal and position data availability.
Operational reliability checks should run before analysis steps.

self_improvement_proposals.title: Add preflight filesystem-read health check
self_improvement_proposals.description: Run a startup check that verifies read access to journal, positions, and observations paths before analysis, and fail fast with actionable diagnostics.
self_improvement_proposals.expected_impact: Prevents silent analysis gaps and reduces missed daily reviews.

self_improvement_proposals.title: Create fallback reflection mode
self_improvement_proposals.description: When files are unavailable, automatically emit a structured incident reflection template and queue a retry once access is restored.
self_improvement_proposals.expected_impact: Maintains continuity in the review cycle and preserves accountability.

self_improvement_proposals.title: Cache end-of-day snapshot artifacts
self_improvement_proposals.description: Persist a compact daily snapshot (positions, realized/unrealized PnL, sector attribution) in a single resilient file for reflection use.
self_improvement_proposals.expected_impact: Improves robustness and speeds up daily synthesis even during partial outages.
